name: codex-session-logging
description: Capture live Codex sessions into user-owned Supabase session history.

interface.shortDescription: Capture prompt and assistant message history.
interface.longDescription: Codex Session Logging captures live hook payloads into a private Supabase Storage bucket with a Postgres catalog. Historical transcript backfills are disabled.
defaultPrompt: Drain queued Codex session logs to Supabase
